Name: Refactor
Description: Two-step refactoring: Engineer identifies and applies refactoring improvements, then BusinessAnalyst verifies scope hasn't drifted from original requirements.

Steps.Name: Refactor
Steps.Description: Engineer identifies and applies the most impactful refactoring step.

Steps.Name: ScopeCheck
Steps.Description: BusinessAnalyst verifies the refactoring stays within scope and hasn't introduced unintended requirement changes.
